overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character walking along the River Thames in London, passing the Palace of Westminster with the London Eye visible in the background. The character changes from casual to formal attire mid-clip while exploring the waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside promenade beside Gothic parliament building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the Thames riverbank with the Palace of Westminster to the left, wearing a white t-shirt and dark jeans

entered.detail: large Gothic Revival stone building with tall arched windows and ornate detailing
giant Ferris wheel visible across the river against the cloudy sky
wide river with gentle currents reflecting the sky
cobblestone or paved pedestrian path along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide riverside promenade on a partly cloudy afternoon. The Gothic stone facade of the Palace of Westminster dominates the left side, while the London Eye stands visible in the distance across the Thames. The area is completely empty of other pedestrians or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: Thames waterfront with view of South Bank attractions

events.description: character spins 180 degrees to face the camera and outfit instantly changes from casual t-shirt to formal white shirt with black tie
white tour boat enters the frame traveling along the river from right to left

agents.ego_description: character walks toward the camera then continues along the waterfront in formal attire, occasionally glancing toward the river

entered.detail: white passenger boat cruising along the Thames

segments.scene_description: The character turns to face the camera revealing a sudden outfit change to formal business attire. She continues walking along the waterfront as a white tour boat appears on the river, traveling downstream. The London Eye remains visible in the background while the Gothic architecture of Parliament stays prominent on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a deserted riverside promenade that shifts from a casual stroll to a formal presentation. It begins with the character walking past the imposing Gothic stone facade of the Palace of Westminster under a partly cloudy afternoon sky, with the London Eye visible in the far distance. As the character turns to face the camera, her casual clothing seamlessly transforms into formal business attire. The scene then continues along the waterfront, where a white tour boat appears on the river and travels downstream. The camera maintains its forward momentum, keeping the prominent architecture of Parliament on the left and the distant silhouette of the London Eye in view.
